title: Event
description: Closed discriminated union of every event kind emitted by the deterministic engine. Events are the read-only flip-side of commands: a command handler returns `events: Event[]` from `dispatch`; consumers (animation timeline, sound system) iterate the log on their own clock. See docs/architecture/event-system.md and docs/architecture/event-schema.md.

unitMoved.description: Tactical-combat or adventure-map: a unit/stack moved from one hex to another. Consumer: animation timeline (walk animation along path). Emitted by BATTLE_MOVE and (for adventure presentation) by MOVE_HERO. See docs/architecture/event-schema.md#unit_moved.

unitAttacked.description: Tactical-combat: a stack performed a melee or ranged attack. Consumer: animation timeline (attack swing + hit/miss), sound system (sword_hit). Emitted by BATTLE_ATTACK and AUTO_RESOLVE_BATTLE. See docs/architecture/event-schema.md#unit_attacked.

unitDied.description: Tactical-combat: a stack reached zero HP and is removed from the battlefield. Consumer: animation timeline (death animation), sound system (death_cry). Emitted by BATTLE_ATTACK, BATTLE_SPELL, and AUTO_RESOLVE_BATTLE. See docs/architecture/event-schema.md#unit_died.

projectileFired.description: Tactical-combat: a ranged unit launched a projectile. Consumer: animation timeline (arrow / magic-bolt arc). Emitted by BATTLE_ATTACK for ranged stacks. See docs/architecture/event-schema.md#projectile_fired.

spellCast.description: Tactical-combat or adventure-map: a hero or stack cast a spell. Consumer: animation timeline (spell VFX at target hex / target stack), sound system (spell_cast_<school>). Emitted by SPELL_CAST. See docs/architecture/event-schema.md#spell_cast.

mineCaptured.description: Adventure-map: a mine changed ownership after MOVE_HERO arrival triggered CAPTURE_MINE. Consumer: animation timeline (flag swap), sound system (mine_capture). See docs/architecture/event-schema.md#mine_captured.

battleInitiated.description: Adventure-map: an encounter created pending battle state after MOVE_HERO arrival triggered INITIATE_BATTLE. Consumer: animation timeline (encounter zoom / banner), sound system. See docs/architecture/event-schema.md#battle_initiated.

townVisited.description: Adventure-map: a hero entered a town tile. Consumer: animation timeline (gate animation), sound system. Emitted as part of MOVE_HERO arrival or visit. See docs/architecture/event-schema.md#town_visited.

buildingBuilt.description: Adventure-map: a town building completed construction. Consumer: animation timeline (build animation), sound system (construction). Emitted after BUILD_BUILDING succeeds. See docs/architecture/event-schema.md#building_built.

heroLevelUp.description: Adventure-map: a hero gained a level. Consumer: animation timeline (XP bar / primary-stat flash), sound system (level_up). Emitted after LEVEL_UP succeeds. See docs/architecture/event-schema.md#hero_level_up.

dayStart.description: Calendar marker: the next strategic day began (hero MP restored, all-players notified). Consumer: animation timeline (banner), sound system. Emitted by END_DAY (advances calendar). See docs/architecture/event-schema.md#day_start.

dayEnd.description: Calendar marker: the strategic day ended (daily resource income collected). Consumer: animation timeline, sound system (end_turn). Emitted by END_DAY before advancing to the next day. See docs/architecture/event-schema.md#day_end.

weekStart.description: Calendar marker: a new week began (weekly unit growth + themed-week roll). Consumer: animation timeline, sound system. Emitted by END_DAY on day-7 rollover. See docs/architecture/event-schema.md#week_start.
